Rules: Founder/private data is never exposed to normal users.
Website-only users are first-class but permission-bounded.
Vault first, permission always.
External/current information must be vetted and verified.
Every important action should be timestamped and auditable.
OpenAI/ChatGPT is bridge/adaptor, not final authority.
No scaffold or fake final system for live/final builds.
Preserve first; add before modify; archive before delete.
